examples_json: [{"en":"The knight swore an oath of loyalty.","zh":"骑士宣誓效忠。"}]
[{"en":"Chivalry required knights to protect the weak.","zh":"骑士精神要求骑士保护弱者。"}]
[{"en":"The knight wore heavy armor into battle.","zh":"骑士穿着厚重的盔甲上战场。"}]
[{"en":"He drew his sword and prepared to fight.","zh":"他拔出剑准备战斗。"}]
[{"en":"The knighting ceremony was very solemn.","zh":"封爵仪式非常庄严。"}]
[{"en":"Knights took an oath to serve the king.","zh":"骑士宣誓效忠国王。"}]
[{"en":"Only nobles could become knights.","zh":"只有贵族才能成为骑士。"}]
[{"en":"The squire helped the knight put on his armor.","zh":"侍从帮骑士穿上盔甲。"}]
[{"en":"The castle had thick stone walls for protection.","zh":"城堡有厚厚的石墙用来防御。"}]
[{"en":"The siege of the castle lasted for months.","zh":"对城堡的围攻持续了数月。"}]
[{"en":"The catapult hurled huge stones at the walls.","zh":"投石机向城墙投掷巨大的石头。"}]
[{"en":"A deep moat surrounded the castle.","zh":"一条深深的护城河环绕着城堡。"}]
[{"en":"The drawbridge was raised at night for safety.","zh":"吊桥在夜间升起以保证安全。"}]
[{"en":"Archers fired arrows from the castle towers.","zh":"弓箭手从城堡塔楼射出箭矢。"}]

description: 城墙上锯齿状的防御结构。
examples_json: [{"en":"Soldiers hid behind the battlements during attacks.","zh":"攻击时士兵躲在城垛后面。"}]
[{"en":"The trebuchet could throw stones weighing hundreds of pounds.","zh":"重型投石机能投掷数百磅重的石头。"}]
[{"en":"King Arthur pulled Excalibur from the stone.","zh":"亚瑟王从石头中拔出王者之剑。"}]

description: 亚瑟王骑士们的会议桌。
examples_json: [{"en":"The Round Table represented equality among knights.","zh":"圆桌代表骑士之间的平等。"}]
[{"en":"Merlin was the wise wizard who advised King Arthur.","zh":"梅林是为亚瑟王出谋划策的智慧巫师。"}]
[{"en":"Camelot was the legendary castle of King Arthur.","zh":"卡美洛是亚瑟王传说中的城堡。"}]
[{"en":"The knights went on a quest for the Holy Grail.","zh":"骑士们踏上了寻找圣杯的征程。"}]

description: 传说中耶稣最后晚餐用的杯子。
examples_json: [{"en":"The search for the Holy Grail was the greatest quest.","zh":"寻找圣杯是最伟大的使命。"}]
[{"en":"The legend of King Arthur has inspired many stories.","zh":"亚瑟王的传说启发了无数故事。"}]

description: 对君主或信念的坚定支持。
examples_json: [{"en":"Loyalty was the highest virtue of a knight.","zh":"忠诚是骑士的最高美德。"}]

description: 连接东西方的古代贸易路线。
examples_json: [{"en":"Marco Polo traveled along the Silk Road to China.","zh":"马可波罗沿着丝绸之路来到中国。"}]
[{"en":"Marco Polo was born in Venice, Italy.","zh":"马可波罗出生在意大利威尼斯。"}]
[{"en":"Marco Polo came from a family of merchants.","zh":"马可波罗出身商人家庭。"}]
[{"en":"Marco Polo served Kublai Khan for many years.","zh":"马可波罗为忽必烈可汗服务多年。"}]
[{"en":"The expedition to the East took over three years.","zh":"前往东方的远征历时三年多。"}]

description: 古代最珍贵的商品之一。
examples_json: [{"en":"He described the amazing spices he found in Asia.","zh":"他描述了在亚洲发现的奇妙香料。"}]
[{"en":"His travelogue amazed readers across Europe.","zh":"他的旅行见闻录让全欧洲的读者惊叹。"}]

description: 结伴穿越沙漠的商人队伍。
examples_json: [{"en":"They joined a caravan for safety across the desert.","zh":"他们加入商队以求安全穿越沙漠。"}]
[{"en":"The Vikings were skilled sailors and warriors.","zh":"维京人是技艺高超的水手和战士。"}]
[{"en":"The Viking longship could sail in shallow waters.","zh":"维京长船能在浅水中航行。"}]
[{"en":"Leif Erikson was a famous Viking explorer.","zh":"莱夫·埃里克松是著名的维京探险家。"}]

description: 维京人最早定居的北大西洋岛屿。
examples_json: [{"en":"The Vikings established settlements in Greenland.","zh":"维京人在格陵兰建立了定居点。"}]

description: 在海上确定方向的技术。
examples_json: [{"en":"Vikings navigated using the sun and stars.","zh":"维京人利用太阳和星星导航。"}]
[{"en":"Viking settlements have been found in North America.","zh":"在北美发现了维京定居点。"}]
[{"en":"Viking raids terrified coastal villages in Europe.","zh":"维京人的突袭让欧洲沿海村庄惊恐不已。"}]
[{"en":"The Viking sagas tell tales of great adventures.","zh":"维京传奇讲述了伟大的冒险故事。"}]

description: 以土地分封为基础的社会制度。
examples_json: [{"en":"Feudalism was the social system of medieval Europe.","zh":"封建制度是中世纪欧洲的社会制度。"}]

description: 贵族的大片土地和住宅。
examples_json: [{"en":"The lord lived in a manor surrounded by farmland.","zh":"领主住在被农田环绕的庄园里。"}]

description: 中世纪耕作土地的劳动者。
examples_json: [{"en":"Peasants worked the land for the lord.","zh":"农民为领主耕种土地。"}]
[{"en":"Craftsmen formed guilds to protect their interests.","zh":"工匠组成行会来保护自己的利益。"}]

description: 修士修女居住和抄书的地方。
examples_json: [{"en":"Monks in monasteries copied books by hand.","zh":"修道院里的修士手抄书籍。"}]
[{"en":"The marketplace was the center of medieval towns.","zh":"集市是中世纪城镇的中心。"}]
[{"en":"Many people went on pilgrimages to holy sites.","zh":"许多人前往圣地朝圣。"}]
[{"en":"The blacksmith made tools and weapons for the village.","zh":"铁匠为村子制作工具和武器。"}]
